hero.headline: Your Trusted Auto Mechanic in Dallas
hero.subheadline: Expert diagnostics, honest repairs, and quality service to keep your vehicle safe and reliable.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Auto Repair & Maintenance
featureSections.body: From routine oil changes to complex engine repairs, our certified technicians handle it all with precision and care.
featureSections.cardBody: We back our work with a warranty, ensuring your car is in top condition.

featureSections.title: Honest & Transparent Service
featureSections.body: We believe in clear communication and fair pricing. No hidden fees, no unnecessary repairs.
featureSections.cardBody: Our loyal customers return because they know we put their needs first.

whyChooseUs.title: Experienced Technicians

whyChooseUs.title: Fair & Transparent Pricing

testimonials.quote: I brought my car in for a check engine light, and they diagnosed it quickly and fixed it at a fair price. Very professional!
testimonials.author: Maria G.

testimonials.quote: They always do great work on my truck. Honest and reliable – I won't go anywhere else.
testimonials.author: Carlos R.

testimonials.quote: Fast service and they explained everything clearly. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Jessica L.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Serviced?
cta.subheadline: Schedule an appointment today and experience the Colombia Auto difference.

servicesPage.intro: At Colombia Auto Repair, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services to keep your vehicle running at its best. Our experienced technicians use state-of-the-art equipment to diagnose and fix issues accurately and efficiently.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repairs to restore performance.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic tools pinpoint issues quickly. From minor tune-ups to major overhauls, we handle it all.
benefits: Peace of mind with thorough inspection

process.title: Diagnostic Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to read error codes.

process.title: Inspection & Report
process.description: Our technician inspects the engine and provides a detailed report.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We perform the necessary repairs and test drive to ensure everything is perfect.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within an hour.

faqs.question: Do you service all car makes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work on all major makes and models.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Keep your brakes in top condition for safety and reliability.
services.longDescription: We inspect, repair, and replace brake pads, rotors, calipers, and more to ensure your stopping power is at its best.

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We check pads, rotors, and fluid levels.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We explain what needs repair and provide a quote.

process.title: Service & Test
process.description: We replace parts and test the brakes thoroughly.

faqs.question: How often should I replace brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 50,000 miles, but it varies.

faqs.question: Do you use OEM parts?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality aftermarket and OEM parts as needed.

services.title: Oil Change & Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Regular maintenance to keep your engine healthy.
services.longDescription: From oil changes to filter replacements, we provide comprehensive maintenance services tailored to your vehicle's needs.

process.title: Fluid Check
process.description: We check oil, coolant, and other fluids.

process.title: Filter Replacement
process.description: We replace oil and air filters as needed.

process.title: Full Inspection
process.description: We perform a quick inspection of belts, hoses, and tires.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 3,000 to 5,000 miles depending on your vehicle.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer conventional and synthetic options.

services.title: AC & Heating System Repair
services.shortDescription: Stay comfortable with a fully functional climate control system.
services.longDescription: We diagnose and repair AC and heating issues, from refrigerant leaks to compressor failures.

process.title: System Check
process.description: We test the AC and heating output and check for leaks.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We identify the root cause using specialized tools.

process.title: Repair & Recharge
process.description: We fix the issue and recharge refrigerant if needed.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Could be low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a leak.

faqs.question: How long does an AC repair take?
faqs.answer: Most repairs are completed within a few hours.

about.headline: About Colombia Auto Repair
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep Dallas drivers safe and satisfied.
story: Colombia Auto Repair was founded with a simple mission: deliver reliable car care with integrity. For over 15 years, our family-owned shop has served the Dallas community, building a reputation for expertise and trust.

Our team of certified technicians stays up-to-date with the latest automotive technology, ensuring every car that leaves our shop is in peak condition. We treat every customer like family, offering transparent communication and fair pricing.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs, and what it doesn't.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-grade parts and proven techniques.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We proudly serve our Dallas neighbors.

contact.headline: Get In Touch
contact.subheadline: We're here to help with all your auto repair needs.
